stemHtml: An Aircraft Condition Monitoring System (ACMS) records aircraft performance and system data, how is this transmitted to the aircraft operator?

options.a: They are transmitted manually by the pilot via radio after landing
options.b: They are transmitted automatically using the FMGS navigation computer only
options.c: They are transmitted only when a maintenance fault is selected by the crew
options.d: They are transmitted automatically by different methods without requiring pilot action
